evals.prompt: Review the metrics changes in the provided diff.
evals.expected_output: Identify and block raw Prometheus metric usage (e.g. prometheus.NewCounter instead of compbasemetrics.NewCounterVec). Must report a BLOCKER.

evals.prompt: Review the metrics changes in the provided diff.
evals.expected_output: Identify unbounded label cardinality (specifically 'namespace' and 'pod' name labels which explode series count). Must report a BLOCKER/QUESTION.

evals.prompt: Review the metrics changes in the provided diff.
evals.expected_output: Identify change/mutation to an existing STABLE metric's signature (e.g. changing labels). Must report a BLOCKER since stable metrics are frozen.

evals.prompt: Review the metrics changes in the provided diff.
evals.expected_output: Identify metric registration happening inside an init() block. Must report a BLOCKER or warning to avoid init() registration to allow feature gating.
